## cttx-webapp-delivery checklist

### User concern

Describe the vague, incomplete, or operationally unclear user concern this PR addresses.

### Concrete deliverable

Describe what the end user, admin, field engineer, or business owner can now see, download, decide, or do.

### TODO tracking

- [ ] I added specific unchecked `todo.md` items before implementation.
- [ ] I marked them complete only after validation passed.

### Regression coverage

Describe the helper, component, router, workflow, or integration tests added or updated.

### Validation

- [ ] TypeScript passed.
- [ ] Full test suite passed.
- [ ] Build passed.

### Handoff summary

Summarize the review-ready outcome in one short paragraph, including what changed and what should be checked by the reviewer.
